# Spec Summary (Lite)

Build the pattern detection engine for AntarMind AI: a suite of in-memory analyzers that process a user's accumulated thought history to surface frequency distributions, time-based emotional trends, repetition clusters, and trigger correlations. The results are converted into template-based human-readable insight messages returned by `GET /api/insights` and displayed in a frontend insights panel.
